name: Airport Transfer & Pickup
description: HorizonVista provides professional door-to-door airport transfer services for arrivals, departures, and inter-city transfers. A driver meets you at arrivals with a name board and monitors your flight for free in case of delays.
coverage: Istanbul Atatürk / Sabiha Gökçen airports (IST, SAW)
Bodrum, Dalaman, Gaziantep and all other major Turkish airports
International airport transfers on request (coordinated with local partners)
vehicle_options: VIP Mercedes / BMW — 1 to 3 passengers, premium interior
includes: Meet & greet at arrivals gate with name board
Flight monitoring (driver waits at no extra charge if flight is delayed)
Child seat available on request (must be booked in advance)
excludes: Parking or toll fees (added to invoice if applicable)
booking_policy: Must be booked at least 24 hours in advance. For same-day bookings contact our WhatsApp line directly.

pricing.price_category: varies by vehicle type and route
pricing.note: Live pricing for each route and vehicle type is maintained in the HorizonVista pricing sheet. Contact us or use the pricing tool for a quote.

name: Hotel Reservation Service
description: HorizonVista can research and book hotels on your behalf anywhere in the world — whether it is a city hotel, beach resort, mountain chalet, boutique riad, or budget hostel. We handle the booking, confirmation, and any special requests so you do not have to.
coverage: Worldwide — any destination where hotel accommodation is available
special_requests_supported: Sea view, mountain view, or specific floor preference
Crib or extra bed for children
booking_policy: Minimum 48 hours advance notice recommended. During peak seasons (summer, religious holidays, New Year) please allow at least 2 weeks. Cancellation and refund terms depend on the hotel's own policy and will be communicated at booking.

service_fee.note: A service fee applies for standalone hotel bookings not bundled with an existing HorizonVista tour package. Fee varies by booking complexity. No extra fee when hotel reservation is part of a package.

pricing.currency: varies (TRY / USD / EUR depending on destination)
pricing.note: Hotel room rates are live market prices. Contact us or use the pricing tool for a quote for your specific dates and destination.
